SEARCH
Package ru.tehkode.permissions

Interface PermissionsGroupData

All Superinterfaces:
PermissionsData
public interface PermissionsGroupData extends PermissionsData
Mutable data handle for a single permission group.

Groups share the full PermissionsData contract for world-scoped permissions, options, and parent-group inheritance. Group-specific operations, if any, are added by implementations rather than on this marker interface.

See Also:
  • PermissionsData
  • PermissionsUserData
